flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Thomas University fell 88% between 2021 and 2024 (25.0% → 2.9%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Thomas University fell 23% between 2021 and 2024 (64.0% → 49.2%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 13 pp at Thomas University vs the 2003–2007 baseline (27.8% vs 40.5%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Thomas University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0% → 0.0%).
